transfertAeroport.title: Private transfers to all airports and train stations
transfertAeroport.subtitle: Enjoy a stress-free transfer to or from airports (CDG, Orly, Lille, Brussels) and train stations. Fixed and transparent prices.
transfertAeroport.adv_custom_desc: Your wishes, your journey. Enjoy an unmatched transport experience designed around your preferences.
transfertAeroport.adv_punctuality_desc: Our drivers always arrive early to ensure your total peace of mind and a serene departure.
transfertAeroport.adv_support_desc: Your peace of mind is our commitment. Our team is at your service around the clock.

transfertSimple.title: The best way to travel between cities
transfertSimple.subtitle: Discover a premium alternative to traditional taxis in Valenciennes. Elite chauffeurs, high-end vehicles, fair prices. MS Prestige Driver redefines your travel comfort. Excellence at every kilometre.
transfertSimple.adv_custom_desc: Your wishes, your journey. Enjoy an unmatched transport experience designed around your preferences.
transfertSimple.adv_secure_desc: Vehicles kept in perfect condition and fully insured to guarantee your comfort and safety.
transfertSimple.adv_support_desc: Your peace of mind is our commitment. Our team is at your service 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

evenementsSpeciaux.feat_driver_desc: Our drivers wear elegant ceremonial attire to match your event.

escapadesLoisirs.title: Theme Parks & Sporting Events
escapadesLoisirs.subtitle: Enjoy your outings with family or friends in complete serenity. With Mon Van Prestige, forget about parking hassles. Fixed, transparent pricing with no hidden fees.
escapadesLoisirs.adv_relax_desc: Enjoy your day to the fullest without worrying about driving. We handle the transport, you enjoy the experience.
escapadesLoisirs.adv_group_desc: Up to 7 passengers in our vehicles. Perfect for families and groups of friends.
escapadesLoisirs.adv_flexible_desc: Pick-up at the agreed time. Adjust your return journey to suit the duration of your visit.

deplPro.title: Book your journey
deplPro.subtitle: Turn your travel time into productive time. On board our premium vehicles, enjoy absolute privacy, Wi-Fi connectivity and a work-friendly environment. Corporate billing available for businesses and professionals.

deplPro.adv_ponct_desc: Our drivers always arrive ahead of time to ensure your complete peace of mind and a smooth departure.
deplPro.adv_pro_desc: Experienced drivers who prioritize your safety while ensuring a comfortable journey.
deplPro.adv_secu_desc: Vehicles maintained in perfect condition and fully insured to guarantee your comfort and safety.

faq.q_how_to_book: How do I make a booking?
faq.a_how_to_book: You can book via our online form, by phone at +33 6 XX XX XX XX or by WhatsApp. A confirmation will be sent to you by email once your request is validated.
faq.q_payment_methods: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a_payment_methods: We accept payments by credit card (Visa, Mastercard), bank transfer and cash. All online transactions are secured.
faq.a_where_to_meet: We operate from Valenciennes and the surrounding area. Our drivers will pick you up at the address of your choice: home, hotel, train station, airport or any other location in Hauts-de-France.
faq.q_animals_allowed: Do you accept animals in your vehicles?
faq.a_animals_allowed: Yes, we accept pets under certain conditions (animal in a suitable transport cage or kept on a leash). Please let us know when booking.
faq.q_no_driver_rental: Can we rent your vehicles without a driver?
faq.a_no_driver_rental: No, our vehicles are exclusively available with a professional driver. We do not offer self-drive rental.
faq.q_chauffeur_disposal: Is it possible to have a chauffeur available for a few hours?
faq.a_chauffeur_disposal: Yes, our 'Chauffeur at Disposal' service allows you to benefit from a dedicated driver for a full or half-day, according to your needs.
faq.a_child_seats: Yes, we provide suitable child seats (baby, child, booster) on simple request when booking, at no extra charge.
faq.q_private_and_pro: Are your services for private individuals and businesses?
faq.a_private_and_pro: Yes, we work with both private individuals and businesses. We offer invoicing adapted to professionals with VAT and a dedicated account manager.
faq.q_delay_policy: What happens if my flight or train is delayed?
faq.a_delay_policy: No problem! We monitor your flight or train status in real time. Your driver automatically adjusts to your actual arrival time, at no extra charge.
faq.q_invoice_payment: How can I pay my invoice?
faq.a_invoice_payment: Your invoice is issued automatically after each trip and sent to you by email. You can pay online by card, by bank transfer or in cash to your driver.
faq.a_how_to_book_2: Booking is simple: use our online form available 24/7, or contact us by phone or WhatsApp. We confirm every request as quickly as possible.
faq.cta_text: Have more questions? Our team is available 7 days a week, 24 hours a day.
